chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2143 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.9116/2025. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.9117/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 09.12.2025 Mr. M.J @ Raees Amir Lutuf, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh. == 1. Urgent application is granted. 2to4. Learned counsel for the petitioners submits that respondent No.14 has constructed illegally water tank over the roof-top of Zulfiqar Centre consisting of ground plus-3 floors owned by the petitioners, as such, they have lodged a complaint before the Regional Director Sindh Building Control Authority, against the said respondent for covering the illegal water tank by installing gate which is being caused annoyance to the petitioners; however, the said complaint has not yet been decided. Learned counsel after arguing some length submits that he would be satisfied and will not press the instant petition on merits if directions be issued to the Regional Director Sindh Building Control Authority, Hyderabad, to decide the application moved by the petitioners which is (available at page 35 of the Court file), after providing opportunity of hearing to all relevant including private respondents strictly in accordance with law. Learned Assistant Advocate General, Sindh, waives notice and raises no objection to the above submission. Order accordingly. The petition stands dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
